pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh OUTPUT_PATH variable and task.json description.
Found exactly in the wget command within setup_task.sh.
verifier.py checks for 'KaplanMeier' in the JASP analyses JSON.
verifier.py explicitly checks settings.get() for time='time', event='status', and strata='sex'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a JASP project file with a Kaplan-Meier survival analysis saved at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/LungSurvival.jasp. The input data is sourced from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vincentarelbundock/Rdatasets/master/csv/survival/lung.csv (with a fallback subset of the NCCTG lung cancer dataset) and placed at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/lung.csv. The required variable configuration correctly assigns 'time' to time, 'status' to event, and 'sex' to strata. The event level representing death must be configured to '2'.
